svg.text: Selected-Layer Jitter Diagnostics From Completed Runs
Completed results only: DoLa reselects every token, while the default always_contrast path refreshes the layer every 4 steps.
Exp11: DoLa Thrashes More Than update4
Exp5: update4 Lowers Thrash Inside The Block Family
Exp11: Quality On The Same Saved Run
The completed exp11 run already shows a large gap.
The update-4 cadence stays low-switch across two scaffolds.

Interpretation: this figure supports the stability claim from completed runs, but a stronger mechanism proof would still come from finishing exp12, which isolates update1/update2/update4/frozen directly.
